title: New Fast-Track Permitting Protocol for International Productions in Central Jakarta
description: Jakarta Film Commission introduces a streamlined permitting system designed to accelerate production approvals for international film and television projects operating across key districts in Central Jakarta.

title: 2025 Jakarta Digital Post-Production Grant Applications Now Open
description: Local filmmakers and post-production studios are invited to apply for the latest grant initiative supporting editing, sound design, VFX, and digital finishing services.

title: Scheduled Maintenance: Jakarta Filming Map v2.0
description: The Jakarta filming location database will undergo scheduled updates and infrastructure improvements to enhance performance and provide more accurate production data.

title: Jakarta Film Commission Partners with Global Green Screen Alliance
description: A new collaboration focused on sustainable production practices aims to reduce environmental impact across film and television productions operating in Jakarta.

title: Cinematography Workshop Series: Capturing the Pulse of Modern Jakarta
description: An intensive workshop program featuring local and international cinematographers exploring urban storytelling, movement, lighting, and documentary techniques.

title: Jakarta International Co-Production Forum Returns This November
description: The annual co-production forum will gather producers, investors, broadcasters, and streaming platforms to explore new opportunities in Southeast Asian storytelling.

title: 20 New Heritage Buildings Added to Official Filming Database
description: Historic sites and colonial-era architecture across Jakarta are now available for location scouting through the official JFC production directory.

title: Jakarta Youth Film Lab Announces 50 Selected Participants
description: Emerging filmmakers from across Indonesia have been selected to participate in mentorship, screenplay development, and production training programs.
